# BOOTSTRAP.md — First-Run Setup

> **Run this once on first boot.** Check for `memory/.bootstrapped-security` and `memory/.bootstrapped-skills` — skip any that already exist.

Fetch and execute the bootstrap scripts from the bootstrap repository:

1. **Security & Budgets:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inceptionstack/loki-agent/main/BOOTSTRAP-SECURITY.md`
2. **Skills:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inceptionstack/loki-agent/main/BOOTSTRAP-SKILLS.md`

Read each file and follow the steps in order. Start with security, then skills.
